vcs_json_input_support.mechanism: cocotb Python code reads JSON constraints/bins and drives RTL through VPI; VCS collects RTL coverage independently with -cm line+branch.
vcs_json_input_support.important_detail: The JSON is consumed by the testbench process, not by VCS directly.

public_dataset_run.command_shape: CASE4_CONSTRAINT_JSON=constraints.json make SIM=vcs MODULE=test_case4_json_sequences TESTCASE=run_json_sequences VERILOG_SOURCES=rtl/case4.v EXTRA_ARGS="-cm line+branch" COMPILE_ARGS="-cm_dir coverage.vdb" SIM_ARGS="-cm_dir sim_build/coverage.vdb"

scoreboard.write_update_rule: for each accepted write beat, update byte lanes whose WSTRB bit is 1
scoreboard.read_compare_rule: returned bytes must match the reference memory at the requested address and length
scoreboard.response_rule: BRESP and RRESP must be OKAY
